name: jq_advanced_demo
description: Advanced JQ data transformations — flatten orders, aggregate by customer, classify into tiers

inputParameters.queryExpression: [.orders[] | {orderId: .id, customerName: .customer.name, customerEmail: .customer.email, items: [.items[] | {itemName: .name, itemPrice: .price, itemQty: .qty, lineTotal: (.price * .qty)}], orderTotal: ([.items[] | .price * .qty] | add)}]

[.flattenedOrders | group_by(.customerName)[] | {customerName: .[0].customerName, customerEmail: .[0].customerEmail, orderCount: length, totalSpent: ([.[].orderTotal] | add), averageOrderValue: (([.[].orderTotal] | add) / length), orders: [.[].orderId]}]

[.customerSummary[] | . + {tier: (if .totalSpent >= 500 then "gold" elif .totalSpent >= 200 then "silver" else "bronze" end)}] | {tieredCustomers: ., tierBreakdown: {gold: [.[] | select(.tier == "gold") | .customerName], silver: [.[] | select(.tier == "silver") | .customerName], bronze: [.[] | select(.tier == "bronze") | .customerName]}}
